cases.description: New project orientation triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I just cloned this repo, help me get oriented
expectations: Runs Phase 1 Reconnaissance (reads package manifest, detects language, maps top-level dirs)
Runs Phase 2 Architecture Analysis (tech stack, pattern, data flow)
Runs Phase 3 Convention Detection (naming, commit style, tooling)
Produces an onboarding guide under 100 lines

cases.description: Explicit onboarding guide request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: write an onboarding guide for new team members on this codebase
expectations: Guide contains Overview, Quick Setup, Architecture, Conventions, Key Files, Common Tasks sections

cases.description: CLAUDE.md project context setup triggers the skill
cases.prompt: set up project context so future agent sessions know what this project is
expectations: Writes the Project Context block between codi:project-context:start / end sentinels in CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md
Runs Phase 6 to create .codi/rules/project-commands.md with install/dev/test/build/lint commands
Invokes `codi generate` to propagate the new rule

cases.description: Bug fix does NOT trigger codebase-onboarding
cases.prompt: fix the failing test in src/auth/login.test.ts
expectations: Does NOT produce an onboarding guide

cases.description: Single-file review does NOT trigger codebase-onboarding
cases.prompt: review the error handling in src/utils/retry.ts
expectations: Does NOT analyze the whole project's architecture
